# Generated by Codex from vanilla peasants_estate privilege definitions.

pie_et_sgui_select_grant_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_free_peasantry }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_free_peasantry }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = yes }
}
